hero_subtitle: SFTY supports compliance teams by automating case assignment and escalation when SLA or review timing thresholds are exceeded to maintain audit-ready workflows and consistent case handling.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Case escalation delays disrupt compliance review
problem_description: Compliance teams often face slow response times when case reviews exceed SLA thresholds without automated escalation. This creates bottlenecks that increase manual workload and weaken audit readiness across digital asset compliance workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY automates case assignment and escalation based on SLA thresholds, connecting review queues, decision logs and evidence to reduce bottlenecks and maintain audit-ready compliance workflows.
workflow_title: From case creation to SLA-based escalation
workflow_description: SFTY monitors case review SLAs and automatically escalates overdue cases to support timely compliance actions and preserve audit evidence during workflow management.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond manual reviews. One escalation layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that turns SLA-based escalations into audit-ready cases, linking alerts, decisions and evidence for clearer operational control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with structured case routing, audit-ready evidence and controlled deployment to meet operational SLAs and enhance oversight in complex compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY manage SLA-based case escalation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance cases are routed on SLA breaches
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports case escalation reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider outputs influence escalation in workflows
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a centralized workflow layer that connects provider outputs, applies internal rules, manages case reviews, and supports audit-ready reporting and regulatory updates.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage case escalation workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates case assignment and escalates reviews based on SLA thresholds, supporting timely action, priority routing, and controlled follow-up within compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence with audit logs to maintain traceability and support review readiness for inquiries or inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects to existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing providers, turning their outputs into structured cases, decisions and evidence rather than replacing underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Automate case escalation with controlled workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY manages SLA-based case assignment, escalation, decision logs and audit-ready evidence in VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
